narrative:
Barnesville Ex Vill Sd (Belmont) exempted village school district has 4,865 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
